title: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies'
summary_full: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," President Donald Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.
summary_public: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," President Donald Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.
